data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Easy cancellation of single occurrence.' However, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the ability to cancel a single occurrence, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is met, leading to a gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of easy cancellation of a single occurrence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
